description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the fedora:latest Docker image and runs a before_script installing wget, genisoimage, sudo, rsync, sed, p7zip, p7zip-plugins, syslinux, redhat-lsb-core, and gettext via dnf install -y. Define a build job (named build) that runs in the default stage, executes the shell command make, caches any files matching CentOS-7-*.iso, and publishes the generated k8os.iso as an artifact. No additional services, variables, or rules are required. The pipeline should produce the ISO artifact after the make command completes.
